mapper.select:
SELECT n.id, n.title, n.notice_type AS noticeType, n.priority, n.status, n.publish_time AS publishTime, n.create_time AS createTime, COUNT(r.id) AS recipientTotal, SUM(CASE WHEN r.read_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS readTotal, SUM(CASE WHEN r.read_flag = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unreadTotal FROM sys_notice n LEFT JOIN sys_notice_recipient r ON r.notice_id = n.id WHERE n.del_flag = 0
AND (n.title LIKE #{likeKeyword} OR n.content LIKE #{likeKeyword})
AND n.status = #{status}
GROUP BY n.id, n.title, n.notice_type, n.priority, n.status, n.publish_time, n.create_time ORDER BY n.id DESC

SELECT n.id, n.title, n.content, n.notice_type AS noticeType, n.priority, n.publish_time AS publishTime, r.read_flag AS readFlag, r.read_time AS readTime, r.receive_time AS receiveTime FROM sys_notice_recipient r INNER JOIN sys_notice n ON n.id = r.notice_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND n.del_flag = 0 AND n.status = 1
AND r.read_flag = #{readFlag}
AND (n.title LIKE #{likeKeyword} OR n.content LIKE #{likeKeyword})
ORDER BY r.receive_time DESC, r.id DESC

SELECT #{noticeId} AS noticeId, COUNT(*) AS recipientTotal, SUM(CASE WHEN read_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS readTotal, SUM(CASE WHEN read_flag = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unreadTotal FROM sys_notice_recipient WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
